backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the car price prediction app, integrating blob storage, authorization, and in-memory prediction history; defines car spec types, price prediction result types, and exposes prediction logic with USD-to-INR conversion.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades stored prediction history by adding a nullable `photos` field (set to null) to the old CarSpecs type, transforming OldActor state into NewActor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features—photo upload in PredictionForm, thumbnail display in PredictionHistory, and photo data passing in useQueries—to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and contents of every component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/COLAB_FRONTEND_RUN_GUIDE.md: Step-by-step guide explaining how to run only the React frontend in Google Colab using Node.js, noting that the Motoko backend cannot run in Colab and must be deployed to the Internet Computer.
frontend/COLAB_PYTHON_MEGA_CODE.py: Self-contained Python script designed to be pasted into a single Google Colab cell; generates a synthetic car dataset, trains multiple ML models, and provides an interactive price prediction form with USD/INR output.
frontend/COLAB_PYTHON_RUN_GUIDE.md: User guide explaining how to copy and run COLAB_PYTHON_MEGA_CODE.py in Google Colab, describing expected outputs including model comparisons, visualizations, and an interactive prediction form.
frontend/COMPLETE_CODE_COPY_PASTE.md: Guide providing two copy/paste paths for the Car Price Prediction System: a standalone Google Colab Python ML script and a full Internet Computer application with React frontend and Motoko backend.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar, chart, and UI element variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app with SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card tags configured for the Car Price Prediction System, loading the app via /src/main.tsx.
frontend/MEGA_FILE_EXPORT.md: Describes the mega-file export format for the project and references the pre-generated mega-export.txt for reconstructing the complete project from a single text file.
frontend/mega-export.txt: Pre-generated single-file export containing the complete source code for both the React/TypeScript frontend and Motoko backend, with file markers for project reconstruction.
frontend/PRODUCTION_DEPLOYMENT.md: Production deployment guide for the Internet Computer application covering pre-deployment checklists (code quality, user flows, UI/UX, SEO) and deployment steps using DFX CLI.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Standard robots.txt allowing all crawlers, specifying the sitemap URL and a crawl delay of 1 second.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap with a single entry for the homepage, set to weekly change frequency and priority 1.0.
frontend/README.md: Developer documentation for the Car Price Prediction System, outlining quick start options (Google Colab ML script or full local application) and project structure overview.
frontend/scripts/generate-mega-file.ts: TypeScript script that recursively walks the project directory, filters files by include/exclude patterns, and generates a single mega-export text file containing all source code with clear file markers.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that handles authentication state, profile setup flow, and renders the appropriate view (loading, unauthenticated, profile setup, prediction form, or main dashboard) wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying project overview, founder info, and contact details fetched from the API, with feature highlight cards.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year, a caffeine.ai attribution link, and a GitHub icon link.
frontend/src/components/GesturePiano.tsx: Main gesture piano UI component that composes WebcamFeed, PianoKeyboard, and VolumeControl, managing active notes and volume state.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with a logo and a login/logout button that uses Internet Identity authentication, clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section for the car price prediction app featuring a headline, CTA buttons for starting a prediction or scrolling to About, a hero image, and three feature highlight cards.
frontend/src/components/LoginForm.tsx: Login card component that triggers Internet Identity sign-in with loading state and toast notifications for success or failure.
frontend/src/components/PianoKeyboard.ts: Visual piano keyboard component rendering 25 keys (C4–C6) with white and black keys, highlighting active notes passed via props.
frontend/src/components/PredictionForm.t: A form component for submitting car details (brand, year, mileage, fuel type, etc.) and optional photos to get a price prediction, using drag-and-drop and file input for image uploads.
frontend/src/components/PredictionHistor: Displays a list of past car price prediction entries as cards, showing car specs, a photo thumbnail, predicted price in INR, and confidence score.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A profile setup form that collects a user's name and email, then saves the profile via a mutation hook with loading and error feedback via toasts.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: Injects a JSON-LD structured data script tag into the document head for SEO, describing the Car Price Prediction System application.
frontend/src/components/VolumeControl.ts: A volume control UI component with a slider and a dynamic volume icon that toggles mute on click, displaying the current volume percentage.
frontend/src/components/WebcamFeed.tsx: Renders a webcam feed with hand tracking, detects gestures to trigger musical note playback/stop via an audio player, and displays FPS and tracking status.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using the user's identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayer.ts: React hook that provides piano-like note playback using the Web Audio API with additive synthesis (multiple oscillators) and ADSR envelopes, with lazy AudioContext initialization and per-note start/stop control.
frontend/src/hooks/useHandTracking.ts: React hook that loads MediaPipe Hands from CDN, initializes hand tracking on a video element, and returns detected hand landmarks along with tracking status and errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context/hook that wraps DFINITY's AuthClient to provide Internet Identity login, logout, and identity state management with status tracking across the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profile CRUD, contact info retrieval, car price prediction (with optional photo uploads), and prediction history.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that configures Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for a music-themed light/dark color system, and adds utility animation classes (fade-in, fade-in-up, pulse-glow).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/gestureRecognition.ts: Utility that analyzes MediaPipe hand landmarks to detect extended fingers and maps the hand's horizontal wrist position to one of 25 piano notes (C4–C6), with per-hand debouncing to avoid rapid re-triggering.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a car price prediction app, tracking existing features (photo upload in form, history thumbnails, mutation updates) and pending feature requests (backend photo storage in Motoko).
